results.rendered_html: śanais śanais ( RV. ) or śanais ( ŚBr. ) ind. (originally instr. pl. of śana, q.v.; cf. uccais, nīcais) quietly, softly, gently, gradually, alternately,  RV. ; &c.

results.rendered_html: śanais und śanais ( ŚAT. BR. ) adv. gaṇa svarādi zu  P. 1,1,37 . = śanakais  AK. 3,5,17 .  H. 1542 .  MED. avy. 82  (svaire und śanaiścare). śanaiścidyantaḥ  ṚV. 8,45,11 . 80,3 . uccaiḥ, śanaiḥ  ŚAT. BR. 7,1,2,18 . 11,4,2,6 . 5,5,9 . vāto 'psu śanairvāti  PAÑCAV. results.rendered_html:
śanais ind.
1 Slowly, gently, quietly.
2 Gradually, by degrees, little by little; dharmaṃ saṃcinuya cchanaiḥ;  Ku. 3. 59 ;  Ms. 3. 217. 
3 Successively, in due order,  Ms. 1. 15. 
4 Mildly, softly.
5 Tardily, sluggishly.
6 Independently. (śanaiḥ śanaiḥ slowly, by slow degrees).
Comp.
— cara a. going or moving slowly; śanaiśvarābyāṃ pādābyāṃ reje grahamayīva sā  Bh. 1. 17.  (where it means ‘Saturn’ also).
— raḥ the planet Saturn.
